name: testimonials-grid
title: Testimonials Grid
description: A testimonials section: a heading above a responsive grid of quote cards, each with author, optional role, and avatar.

preview.summary: Heading above a responsive grid of quote cards, each with author, optional role and avatar.

sampleContent.title: What our customers say.
sampleContent.description: Read why product teams choose Acme for the reporting work that used to take a sprint.

testimonials.quote: Using Acme has been like unlocking a secret design superpower. The flexibility to customize every surface is incredible.
testimonials.author: Henry Lee

testimonials.quote: Acme transformed the way we ship customer dashboards. What used to take a sprint now takes an afternoon.
testimonials.author: Isabella Garcia

testimonials.quote: The component library accelerated our entire workflow. Acme is a genuine game-changer for our team.
testimonials.author: Liam Brown
